description: This updated closet essential tops out wish-list this season! Perfect for the LBD or to dress up an office ensemble, this is the go-to shoe. Stylish yet not over-the-top, this heeled sandal is perfect to make the right board room impression. heels: 3.5"UpperSynthetic leather strap over the forefoot with top-stitch detail and synthetic patent trimsMetal buckle and wooden toggle embellishment on frontSmooth synthetic leather footbed OutsoleTPU outsole with heelSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
